title: calycera integrifolia
intro: Calycera integrifolia, also known as Calycera, is a perennial plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Calycera integrifolia include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Calycera integrifolia typically involve the use of its roots and leaves, often in the form of infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
